features.name: single-bit part-select assigned to output port
features.description: Code should include a single-bit part-select from a wider input signal directly assigned to a 1-bit output port without an intermediate wire

features.name: range part-select assigned to output port
features.description: Code should include a contiguous range part-select from a wider input signal directly assigned to a multi-bit output port without an intermediate wire

features.name: multiple outputs sharing the same bit-range extraction
features.description: Code should include multiple output ports each assigned the same bit-range part-select from one input, exercising whether the emitter inlines the expression or introduces a shared intermediate wire

features.name: nested bit extraction flattened to single part-select
features.description: Code should include nested bit-extraction operations such as bits-of-bits or bits-of-head/tail that can be folded into a single contiguous part-select on the original signal
